---
title: "Requirements"
output: html_document
---

# Requirements

## R Version

-   R Version R version 4.5.1 (2025-06-13 ucrt)

## R Packages

The list of R packages used can be found in the `renv.lock` file. The packages are required to run the code with: - `renv` version 1.2.3

Install the `renv` version above and run the following command in R:

```         
renv::restore()
```
